---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability (UI, runtime, mapping coverage)
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What use case is currently hard or impossible?

## Proposed solution

What should fhir2omop do?

## Alternatives considered

If you've thought about workarounds, list them.

## Scope

- [ ] mapspec — new edge / new vocabulary
- [ ] runtime — Stage-2 SQL generation
- [ ] UI / docs
- [ ] tooling (scripts, REPL, generators)

## Additional context

Links to OHDSI / FHIR / IG docs that motivate the request.
